caption: 限额余额查询

fields.caption: 其它商业风险赔偿比例
fields.name: 其它商业风险赔偿比例

view.params:
SELECT ywrybiao.ryxm
FROM ywrybiao where ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "单证"+ "%" 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.ryxm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

name: 限额余额查询
